title: Better Archeology (1.20 Update)
description: Better Archeology adds new life to the archeology mechanic in Minecraft.
body:
**Better Archeology** adds new life to the archeology mechanic in Minecraft. As for now, it changes how suspicious blocks are being excavated by the brush. Instead of a plain texture change, suspicious blocks now crumble when you use a brush on them!
#
**This pack does not require OptiFine or any of its alternatives to work.**
#

Also available on Planet Minecraft:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/better-archeology/
